data.headline: End-of-Day Summary: Portfolio Flat, Trailing SPY by 52 bps
data.summary: Portfolio returned 0.0% with no positions held. Starting cash of $1,000,000 remains intact. SPY benchmark returned +0.0523%, resulting in an alpha of -0.0523%. No trades were executed during the session. The portfolio maintained full cash positioning throughout the day.
data.risk_note: Portfolio underperformed benchmark by 52 basis points due to cash drag. No open positions creates market timing risk. Consider trading alignment with benchmark composition.
